ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the match belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the match belongs to */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees in the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "footedness" TEXT /* Player's footedness (e.g., left, right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the squad the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the team plays */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Team's primary color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squads" (
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad */,
  "squad_name" TEXT /* Name of the squad */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the squad belongs to */,
  "squad_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the squad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the league belongs to */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of completed passes */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "total_goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists */,
  "total_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target */,
  "total_shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots off target */,
  "total_passes_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of completed passes */,
  "total_tackles_won" INTEGER /* Total number of tackles won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "total_goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists */,
  "total_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target */,
  "total_shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots off target */,
  "total_passes_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of completed passes */,
  "total_tackles_won" INTEGER /* Total number of tackles won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_player_xref" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the player participated in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player participating in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "start_or_bench" TEXT /* Whether the player started the match or was a substitute (e.g., 'start', 'bench') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_team_xref" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the team participated in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team participating in the match */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the venue is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the stadium is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_position_xref" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player having the position */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position the player has */,
  "primary_position" INTEGER /* Whether the position is the player's primary position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
